overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a character exploring an ancient Egyptian temple complex. The character walks through hieroglyphic-covered corridors, open courtyards with palm trees, and inner sanctums with ceremonial pools, ending at a golden statue shrine. The scene features bright midday sunlight and detailed historic architecture.

events.description: exits narrow corridor into open courtyard with palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking through the entrance corridor following an NPC guide toward the daylight

notable_agents.action: temple guide walking ahead of the player toward the courtyard exit

entered.detail: stone walls covered in colorful Egyptian hieroglyphics and reliefs
short flight of stone steps leading up to the courtyard
metal lantern hanging from the ceiling of the corridor entrance
large stone column with painted decorative patterns at the corridor exit

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow entrance corridor with hieroglyphic-covered walls, following an NPC guide. The corridor opens up toward a bright exit, with stone stairs leading up to an open courtyard visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open temple courtyard with palm trees and market stalls

events.description: enters the temple building through the main entrance doorway

agents.ego_description: walking across the sunlit courtyard toward the temple entrance

notable_agents.action: temple worker standing near the entrance columns

entered.detail: massive stone temple front with hieroglyphic carvings and large entrance
tall palm tree in a large decorative planter
white fabric awning shading a market stall area
tall metal stand with burning fire near the temple steps

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a bright open courtyard with palm trees and scattered flower petals. The massive temple facade dominates the view ahead, with market canopies and burning braziers lining the approach to the entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: inner corridor with massive decorated columns and hieroglyphic walls

events.description: approaches the inner ceremonial pool area with large columns

agents.ego_description: walking through the grand columned corridor with hieroglyphic walls

entered.detail: enormous cylindrical column with blue and yellow geometric patterns
colorful woven rugs laid along the stone floor
tall iron stand with burning torch providing light

segments.scene_description: Inside the temple, the character walks through a grand corridor lined with massive decorated columns and hieroglyphic walls. The space is sheltered from direct sunlight, with torch stands providing warm illumination along the carpeted stone floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: inner sanctum with ceremonial pool and worshippers

events.description: turns right to walk around the central ceremonial pool
enters darker inner corridor leading to the statue shrine

agents.ego_description: walking around the ceremonial pool observing the worshippers and surroundings

notable_agents.action: worshipper kneeling in prayer beside the pool
priest walking through the sanctum carrying offerings

entered.detail: rectangular stone pool with green water surrounded by columns
massive column with distinctive blue and yellow chevron patterns
dark doorway leading to side chambers off the main sanctum

segments.scene_description: The character enters the inner sanctum featuring a central ceremonial pool surrounded by massive chevron-patterned columns. Worshippers kneel in prayer around the pool scattered with flower petals, while the character walks around the perimeter toward a dark corridor exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: inner sanctum corridor leading to golden statue shrine

events.description: approaches the golden statue shrine at the end of the corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit inner corridor toward the golden statue

notable_agents.action: worshipper kneeling in prayer before the golden shrine

entered.detail: elaborate golden statue of a deity enclosed in a decorated niche
burning fire bowl on a tall stand illuminating the corridor
decorated stone frame surrounding the statue shrine entrance

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow inner corridor lit by burning braziers, approaching an ornate doorway framing a golden statue shrine. A worshipper kneels in prayer near the shrine as the character moves toward the sacred inner sanctum.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a narrow temple entrance through a sprawling courtyard and into the depths of a sacred inner sanctum. It begins within a tight corridor of hieroglyphic-covered walls, moving forward as the space opens up toward stone stairs and a bright exit. As the camera emerges into the blinding midday sun, the scene expands into a wide courtyard filled with palm trees and market canopies before transitioning back into the sheltered grandeur of a columned hall lit by warm torches. The movement then flows into a ceremonial chamber centered around a petal-strewn pool and kneeling worshippers, shifting from the open air to a more intimate, shadowed atmosphere. Finally, the camera glides through a narrow passage lined with burning braziers, culminating in the discovery of an ornate doorway that frames a golden statue shrine.
